category.scope_note: Air-source heat pump compliance comparison for space heating and cooling applications exported from China to Canada.

target_market_label.zh: 加拿大（NRCan / CSA / 英法双语）
target_market_label.zht: 加拿大（NRCan / CSA / 英法雙語）

title.en: China-to-Canada Air-source Heat Pump Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入加拿大：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入加拿大：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China air-source heat pump documentation against Canada's Energy Efficiency Regulations, EnerGuide reporting and labelling, CSA/SCC electrical safety certification, HFC refrigerant controls, and English/French bilingual market requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国空气源热泵文件与加拿大能效法规、EnerGuide申报和标签、CSA/SCC电气安全认证、HFC制冷剂管制以及英法双语市场要求的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國空氣源熱泵文件與加拿大能效法規、EnerGuide申報和標籤、CSA/SCC電氣安全認證、HFC制冷劑管制以及英法雙語市場要求的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SCC-accredited certification-body assessment, NRCan filing, refrigerant-handling guidance, customs determination, provincial electrical approval, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, dealers, and installers should verify current Canadian federal regulations, provincial and territorial electrical codes, bilingual labelling rules, refrigerant controls, and destination-province installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SCC认可认证机构评审、NRCan申报、制冷剂处理指导、海关裁定、省级电气批准或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、经销商和安装方在出货、销售或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行加拿大联邦法规、省和地区电气规范、双语标签规则、制冷剂管制及目的省安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SCC認可認證機構評審、NRCan申報、制冷劑處理指導、海關裁定、省級電氣批准或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、經銷商和安裝方在出貨、銷售或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行加拿大聯邦法規、省和地區電氣規範、雙語標籤規則、制冷劑管制及目的省安裝規則。

answer_first.en: NRCan minimum performance and EnerGuide filing, CSA/SCC electrical safety certification to Canadian standards such as CSA C22.2 No. 236 and CSA C22.2 No. 120, federal HFC controls, and English/French bilingual markings and documents are the major Canada compliance gaps for Chinese air-source heat pumps.
answer_first.zh: NRCan最低能效和EnerGuide申报、依据CSA C22.2 No. 236及CSA C22.2 No. 120等加拿大标准取得CSA/SCC电气安全认证、联邦HFC管制，以及英法双语标识和文件，是中国空气源热泵进入加拿大的主要合规差距。
answer_first.zht: NRCan最低能效和EnerGuide申報、依據CSA C22.2 No. 236及CSA C22.2 No. 120等加拿大標準取得CSA/SCC電氣安全認證、聯邦HFC管制，以及英法雙語標識和文件，是中國空氣源熱泵進入加拿大的主要合規差距。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, accredited certification body, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
